none.description: Full-width and background containers. Fixed navigation containers such as headers, and side-panels.

xl.description: Extra large rounding for prominent containers

xxl.description: Extra extra large rounding for cards and items

xxxl.description: Maximum rounding for modals and large containers

full.description: Full rounding is reserved high-visibility components. This shape is intended to draw attention. Buttons, Badge, Status Indicator, Essential Inputs, Border Containers (Not Cards)
